principle: Each cache_key below is an accepted advisor finding with documented rationale. CI fails if new ERROR advisors appear that are NOT in this allowlist. Update this file by re-running advisor scan and adding new accepted findings with rationale.

accepted_errors.rationale: Public surface: view used by anon/authenticated for homepage stats. SECURITY DEFINER intentional to bypass member RLS while exposing only safe aggregated columns.
Exec analytics view: aggregate-only, admin-only access via GRANT. DEFINER required to read member_certifications across tribes.
V4 auth foundation: view joins persons/engagements/members for can()/rls_can() to work. Must run as owner to traverse identity bridge.
Exec analytics — same pattern as vw_exec_cert_timeline.
Aggregated impact data exposed to all authenticated members (gamification). DEFINER avoids per-row RLS cost.
Exec analytics — same pattern as vw_exec_cert_timeline.
LGPD-safe member view: explicitly filters PII columns; intended public surface.
Same as members_public_safe — legacy alias kept for MCP reader compat.
Public leaderboard: aggregated XP across members, intentionally visible to all authenticated.
Member-scoped attendance stats exposed to the owner + admin; DEFINER required to cross-join attendance + events + members.
Bridge view for recurrence UI. Aggregates events without exposing non-authorized rows; DEFINER intentional.

accepted_warnings.rationale: Moving pg_trgm to extensions schema requires qualifying all usages (similarity, gin_trgm_ops). Deferred — tracked in ADR-0012 tech debt.
pg_net used by pg_cron HTTP hooks; same cost as pg_trgm to relocate. Deferred.
Authenticated members need read access for /teams + /tribe/*. Converting to regular view + RLS would hurt perf.
Public lead-submission form — WITH CHECK=true intentional. Rate limit opportunity tracked.
Toggle available in Supabase Auth dashboard (not via migration). Pending human action — low priority.
